response.overview: Deadly Arts: Capoeira is a 2008 documentary episode from the National Geographic series Deadly Arts, which explores the Afro-Brazilian martial art disguised as dance.  Hosted by black belt Josette D. Normandeau, the series examines the technique, culture, history, and philosophy of six martial arts, with the Capoeira episode focusing on its origins in Brazil.
response.title: Deadly Arts Capoeira National Geographic
